No Poverty.reason: The course's general mention of 'social responsibility and sustainability issues' is too broad to directly link to specific poverty alleviation targets. No explicit evidence supports this SDG.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course syllabus that relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content does not include any topics related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a master's level program explicitly focused on acquiring 'advanced professional knowledge' and developing 'global perspective', directly contributing to quality tertiary education and relevant skills (Targets 4.3, 4.4).
evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)
習得科管與智財相關進階專業知識 (Students will acquire advanced professional knowledge in Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management)

Gender Equality.reason: No specific course content or learning outcomes address gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The syllabus contains no information related to water resources, sanitation, hygiene, or water pollution.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no mention of energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency within the course description or schedule.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly supports Target 8.2 by focusing on 'technological upgrading and innovation' and how 'enterprises use innovation to compete and solve problems', fostering economic productivity and entrepreneurship.
evidence: 科技與創新管理 (Technology and Innovation Management)
企業如何面對競爭，透過創新解決困境 (how enterprises face competition and solve difficulties through innovation)
產業/企業創新程序 (Industry/enterprise innovation process)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: This SDG is central to the course, which is titled 'Technology and Innovation Management' and extensively covers '科技創新', '研發創新', '產業/企業創新', and '科技策略', directly aligning with Targets 9.5 and 9.b.
evidence: 科技與創新管理 (Technology and Innovation Management)
研發創新的「組織方式」 (Organizational methods for R&D innovation)
國內科技產業鏈之企業 (domestic technology industry chain enterprises)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course does not address income inequality, social inclusion, or discriminatory practices.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No course content relates to urban planning, sustainable infrastructure, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's core competency 'understand and identify social responsibility and sustainability issues' links to Target 12.6. '製程創新' (process innovation) can also contribute to resource efficiency and waste reduction (Targets 12.2, 12.5).
evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Climate Action.reason: The general mention of 'sustainability issues' provides a minimal, inferred link to climate action, but the course does not explicitly focus on climate change mitigation or adaptation.
evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Life Below Water.reason: No course content addresses marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The syllabus does not include topics related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers '保護創新' (Protecting innovation) and '智慧財產管理' (intellectual property management), which are integral to the rule of law and strong institutions (Target 16.3).
evidence: 智慧財產管理的連結 (link to intellectual property management)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly addresses Target 17.6 through its focus on '合作策略:內外部技術與開放式創新' (Cooperation strategy: internal/external technology and open innovation), promoting knowledge sharing and collaboration.
evidence: 合作策略:內外部技術與開放式創新 (Cooperation strategy: internal/external technology and open innovation)
